caption: A man wearing a white shirt and a dark blazer stands beside a presentation screen at an event. He is gesturing toward the screen with his right arm extended. The slides feature a white background with a blue footer containing the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". The content of the slides focuses on code snippets for a technical presentation. Initially, the screen displays "CONSUMER - STEP 3: RUN IT!" along with Python code and a terminal window showing activity logs. As the presentation progresses, the slides transition to "PRODUCER STEP 1: FIND CODE" and then to "PRODUCER - STEP 2: CELERIZE IT", which showcases different blocks of Python code involving imports from "crypto_ml_data_loader". The man remains in the same position, continuing to present and point to the evolving code on the screen across the sequence.
